name: Sites & landing pages that convert
tagline: A fast, accessible web presence built to win customers.

packages.name: Landing Express
packages.hook: A page that works to win you customers.
packages.problem: Perfect for launching a product, a campaign or capturing leads. Fast, beautiful and built to make people act.
deliverables: A high-conversion page, ready in a few weeks
Optimized for Google (base SEO) and to load fast
Form and analytics to measure results
packages.outcome: A presence that captures leads from day one.

packages.name: Pro Site
packages.hook: Your business, well presented and easy to find.
packages.problem: The complete site that builds trust, shows up on Google and that you can update yourself.
deliverables: A multi-page corporate site, fast and accessible
Technical SEO and careful performance (Core Web Vitals)
A content manager so you edit without depending on anyone
packages.outcome: A website that builds trust, attracts traffic and turns visits into customers.

faq.q: Will I be able to update the site myself?
faq.a: Yes, the Pro Site includes a content manager so you edit without depending on anyone.

faq.q: Will it show up on Google?
faq.a: Yes. I take care of technical SEO and performance (Core Web Vitals) from the start.
